subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Verily, the believing and assured maidservants have attained unto the supreme gift in this Dispensation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله قد فازت الاماء المومنات الموقنات بالموهبه العظمی فی هذا الکور
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love of God, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as sun, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
